Total customers: " + customers.size() + "
"); writer.println("--- Customer List ---"); for (Customer customer : customers) { writer.printf("  [%d] %s <%s> - %s%n", customer.getId(), customer.getName(), customer.getEmail(), customer.getCity()); cityCount.put(customer.getCity(), cityCount.getOrDefault(customer.getCity(), 0) + 1); } writer.println("
--- City Breakdown ---"); for (Map.Entry<String, Integer> entry : cityCount.entrySet()) { writer.printf("  %s: %d customer(s)%n", entry.getKey(), entry.getValue()); } writer.println("
=== End of Report ==="); } catch (IOException e) { e.printStackTrace(); } } } class Customer { private int id; private String name; private String email; private String city; public Customer(int id, String name, String email, String city) { this.id = id; this.name = name; this.email = email; this.city = city; } public int getId() { return id; } public String getName() { return name; } public String getEmail() { return email; } public String getCity() { return city; } } ``` The file `/app/src/main/java/com/example/customerreport/CustomerReportGenerator.java` does not exist.
